articles.author: Pat Forde
articles.title: Bambi, Buses and Bureaucracy: Cortina’s Pace of Life Prospers Despite Olympic Buzz - Sports Illustrated
articles.description: American efficiency and enterprise be damned: This host city offers a refreshing lesson in carpe diem to anyone willing to sit back and take in the splendor of Dolomite living.
articles.content: CORTINA dAMPEZZO, Italy Every Olympics is only as good as its mass transportation, and this particular moment was a snapshot of Italian inefficiency. Trying to descend into town from the Alpine ski v… [+9158 chars]
